title: Notification Automation When New Column is Created

posts.author: LaurelOnco360 (Laurel)
posts.cookedHtml: This may be basic but can I set a automation to notify board subscribers when a new column is created on a board? I have a board that I am using to track new hire onboarding and each column represents an employee and each item is a task that must be completed. I would really like for my board subscribers to get a notification every time I add a new employee (column) to the board. Is this something simple that I am completely missing?
